channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Microsoft names cybercriminals who created explicit deepfakes
item.description: Four criminals have been named by Microsoft after stealing Azure cloud credentials to generate celebrity deepfakes.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Bitcoin jumps after Trump strategic reserve announcement
item.description: The cryptocurrency market surged over the weekend after President Trump announced his plans to create a strategic crypto reserve and hinted at details about the highly anticipated plan.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Nvidia GTC 2025: What to Expect
item.description: Nvidia's GTC 2025 conference is just around the corner, and the tech world is buzzing with anticipation. Here's what to expect from the event, including updates on Nvidia's AI leadership, GPU advancements, and edge AI capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: I’d love a laptop powered by the sun... and Lenovo’s Yoga Solar PC at MWC 2025 looks like a sizeable step towards that dream
item.description: A highly efficient solar panel in a laptop lid? Lenovo’s Yoga Solar PC is turning heads at MWC 2025 and it’s a genuinely exciting new laptop concept.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Brand new Alexa
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011, which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Energy Department scientists participate in 'AI Jam' with OpenAI, Anthropic
item.description: Nearly 1,000 scientists from multiple U.S. National Laboratories gathered Friday to test artificial intelligence (AI) models from leading firms like OpenAI and Anthropic in an effort to harness the advancing technology for science and national security purposes.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: R.I.P. Skype: 2003-2025
item.description: The time is up for Skype, one of the O.G.s of online communication. The once-popular 22-year-old communications software is being retired by Microsoft in May 2025, with the company’s Teams collaboration suite replacing its predecessor.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: East Bay startup’s new stove that plugs into a normal wall outlet could be major gain for health and climate
item.description: The sleek, standard four-burner electric induction stove runs on 120 volts, meaning there is no need to pay a licensed electrician thousands of dollars to rewire to 240 volts, which many electric stoves require.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Santa Cruz-based Joby Aviation expects first air taxi passengers in late 2025, early 2026
item.description: The company also reported it received more than $1 billion of additional funding and commitments in the fourth quarter.
item.dc:creator: James Herrera, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple unveils 'age assurance' technology amid child safety push
item.description: Apple will introduce "age assurance" technology to boost children's privacy and safety on the company's devices, the company announced Thursday as part of its broader push to protect kids online.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: AI priorities: IT leaders emphasize productivity over innovation
item.description: IT leaders are still aiming for the low-hanging fruit when using AI, zeroing in on improving employee productivity rather than more advanced uses such as enabling innovation or expanding revenue, according to a new survey.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: One Tech Tip: Getting a lot of unwanted phone calls? Here are ways to stop them
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Unwanted phone calls are out of control. Whether it's a robocall trying to sell you something or spam calls from scammers trying to rip you off, it's enough to make you want to stop answering your phone.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: StarlingX bridges IPv4-IPv6 gap with dual-stack networking support
item.description: The Open Infrastructure Foundation is out with the release of StarlingX 10.0, a significant update to the open-source distributed cloud platform designed for IoT, 5G, O-RAN and edge computing applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Kandji exec: Vision Pro is a good fit for the enterprise
item.description: Apple’s recently announced partnership with Dassault Systemés shows the Vision Pro as the cutting-edge enterprise solution it has become, but business users will want to ensure these devices can be managed like the rest of their critical IT infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Man who said he was upset with Musk and Trump charged with threatening to burn down xAI facility
item.description: ASHLAND CITY, Tenn. (AP) — A Tennessee man has been charged with an act of terrorism after he threatened to burn down an xAI facility because he was upset with its founder, Elon Musk, and President Donald Trump, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alibaba open sources its video-generation AI model
item.description: Chinese cloud provider Alibaba has released four versions of its video-generation AI model as open source, allowing users to download and run them for free on capable PCs.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Signal will exit Sweden rather than dilute message security
item.description: The CEO of Signal said Tuesday that the service will leave Sweden rather than comply with a rule that will require vendors to capture all secure messages and save a plain text copy, in case authorities later want to subpoena that data.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Hackers slam Michigan tribe for not negotiating after ransomware attack
item.description: A group called RansomHub has claimed responsibility for the cyberattack and submitted a letter to provide its “side of the events.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Meet the AI real estate agent making millions
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Five takeaways from Cisco Live EMEA
item.description: Cisco held its European user event in Amsterdam this month, presenting a good mix of industry trends, product innovation, and vision from Cisco as to where they see the market going.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Red Hat OpenShift 4.18 expands cloud-native networking
item.description: Red Hat is updating its OpenShift platform with a series of capabilities that will provide more advanced networking and virtualization functionality for cloud-native deployments. OpenShift is Red Hat’s commercially supported Kubernetes distribution.
item.dc:creator: Network World
